description_long: This is a medium-sized, rectangular shopping basket with a perforated, mesh-like body made of orange plastic. The basket features two sturdy, black handles that can pivot upward for carrying or downward for stacking. The sides and base of the basket are covered in evenly spaced circular holes, providing ventilation and reducing weight. The basket's rim is reinforced with a thicker plastic band for added durability, and there is a blank rectangular label area on the longer sides for potential branding or identification. The interior appears hollow, and some indistinct items are visible inside, suggesting it is designed for carrying groceries or small goods.
description: A rectangular orange plastic shopping basket with black pivoting handles and a perforated mesh design, featuring reinforced rims and a blank label area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the long side of the orange basket, black handles upright, and a blank label area clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow end of the basket, with the handles aligned and the mesh pattern visible on the side.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the opposite long side with a blank label area and mesh holes.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow end and upright handles, with the mesh pattern and some interior contents visible.
attribute_wire_basket_pattern: Circular perforated mesh pattern with evenly spaced round holes covering all sides and base; medium density with moderate plastic thickness.
attribute_handlebar_design: Two straight, pivoting handles made of black plastic with a flat grip area; no visible ergonomic padding or branding.
attribute_wheel_configuration: No wheels present; this is a hand-carried basket.
